title: How Anthropic Engineers ACTUALLY Prompt Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Anthropic engineers prompt Claude Code and distills 4 rules: prompt skills not the model, treat skills as more than prompts, build composable rather than custom skills, and skills improve per session. The video argues most users are applying prompts incorrectly and demonstrates patterns like saving scripts inside skills and controlling invocation permissions.
